CREATE DICTIONARY dict_name (id UInt64, parent_id UInt64) PRIMARY KEY id;
WITH (SELECT dictIsIn('dict_name', 4, 2)) AS is_child_2, (SELECT dictIsIn('dict_name', 3, 2)) AS is_child_3 SELECT is_child_2, is_child_3;
SELECT child_id, dictIsIn('dict_name', child_id, 1) AS is_child FROM t1;
SELECT child_id, (SELECT dictIsIn('dict_name', child_id, 1) FROM t1) AS is_child FROM t1;
SELECT child_id, dictIsIn('dict_name', child_id, ancestor_id) AS is_child FROM t1 CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT id AS ancestor_id FROM dict_name);
SELECT dictIsIn('dict_name', (SELECT MIN(child_id) FROM t1), 1) AS is_child;
SELECT dictIsIn('dict_name', MAX(child_id), MAX(parent_id)) FROM (SELECT child_id, parent_id FROM dict_name);
SELECT dictIsIn('dict_name', child_id, 1) FROM t1 ARRAY JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM dict_name) AS ancestors;
